title: Generative AI Adoption in the Bangladeshi Software Engineering Workforce: A Simulation-Based Analysis of Diffusion, Productivity, and Skills Gaps
description:
The first integrated quantitative analysis of generative AI (GenAI) adoption in the Bangladeshi software engineering workforce for 2022 to 2026. The analysis combines a Bass diffusion model, a reproducible synthetic workforce simulation (N = 1,500) calibrated to BASIS, BBS and World Bank statistics, heterogeneous treatment-effect estimation by English-proficiency stratum, and a skills-gap index by university tier. Four policy scenarios are projected to 2031. The repository contains the full Python pipeline, 40 automated unit tests, 12 publication-quality figures, 11 data tables, and the complete LaTeX manuscript prepared for peer review.

Reproducibility: all outputs are deterministic with random seed SEED = 20260524.

Licences: source code under MIT; paper, figures, and data tables under CC BY 4.0.
